title: Submit job - Missing brackets in GIVEN
when: the operator submits the job file
ibdd_representation:
GIVEN JF true
WHEN ?submit.jf [true] JF := jf
THEN [JF.processed = true]

title: Start printing - Missing gate symbol
given: a controller job is in the queue
ibdd_representation:
GIVEN CJ [CJ.state = Pending]
WHEN printstart.cj [true] CJ.state := Printing
THEN [CJ.state = Printing]

title: Restart cleanup - Missing brackets in condition
when: the operator restarts the printer controller
then: the printed jobs clean up is executed
ibdd_representation:
GIVEN [is_running(CTRL)]
WHEN ?restart true true
THEN !cleanup [true] PJL := empty(PJL)
[is_empty(PJL)]

title: Complete job - Missing postcondition
ibdd_representation:
GIVEN CJ [CJ.state = Printing]
WHEN !complete.cj [true] CJ.state := Completed
THEN

title: Add to queue - Invalid syntax with parentheses
when: the operator adds a job to queue

title: Pause printing - Malformed guard with missing operator
ibdd_representation:
GIVEN CJ [CJ.state Printing]
WHEN ?pause.cj [true] CJ.state := Paused
THEN [CJ.state = Paused]

title: Resume job - Missing condition brackets in THEN switch
ibdd_representation:
GIVEN CJ [CJ.state = Paused]
WHEN ?resume.cj [true] CJ.state := Printing
THEN !printstart.cj CJ.state := Printing
[CJ.state = Printing]

title: Add to cart - Missing interaction variables
when: the user adds product to cart
ibdd_representation:
GIVEN P [P.price > 0]
WHEN ?add_to_cart [true] CART.items := add(P, CART.items)
THEN [is_in_list(P, CART.items)]

title: Cancel job - Wrong assignment syntax
given: a job is in the queue
then: the job is removed from queue
ibdd_representation:
GIVEN CJ [is_in_list(CJ, QUEUE)]
WHEN ?cancel.cj [true] CJ.state = Cancelled
THEN [CJ.state = Cancelled ∧ ¬is_in_list(CJ, QUEUE)]
